_publications._publicationTitle: Fibroblasts Attenuate Anti-Tumor Drug Efficacy in Tumor Cells via Paracrine Interactions with Tumor Cells in 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Cultures

_contextSnippet: Elevated P-glycoprotein expression was identified as a mechanism of fibroblast-mediated drug resistance; inhibiting P-glycoprotein partially restored drug sensitivity in pNF1 structures cocultured with fibroblasts
details: P-glycoprotein (ABCB1/MDR1) upregulation identified as a mechanism underlying fibroblast-mediated drug resistance in pNF1 cocultures; pharmacological inhibition of P-glycoprotein in TAME chip cocultures partially rescued sensitivity to selumetinib and mirdametinib; cell viability assessed by Calcein AM staining with Volocity 3D reconstruction software
